final_files.tests/test_final_matrix_failures.py:
from harness.runner import run_matrix


def test_multi_target_results_keep_order_and_target_specific_failures():
    def deployable(context):
        return context.case_id != "beta"

    def manifest(context):
        if context.case_id == "gamma":
            raise ValueError("missing digest for gamma")
        return True

    results = run_matrix(
        ["alpha", "beta", "gamma"],
        [("deployable", deployable), ("manifest", manifest)],
    )

    assert [
        (item.case_id, item.check_name, item.passed)
        for item in results
    ] == [
        ("alpha", "deployable", True),
        ("alpha", "manifest", True),
        ("beta", "deployable", False),
        ("beta", "manifest", True),
        ("gamma", "deployable", True),
        ("gamma", "manifest", False),
    ]
    assert results[-1].detail == "ValueError: missing digest for gamma"
